title: Success Comes To Cow Creek by Edward Taylor — Deep Poetry Lines
content:
I sit on the tracks,
a hundred feet from
earth, fifty from the
water. Gerald is
inching toward me
as grim, slow, and
determined as a

title: Dream On by Edward Taylor — Sad Poetry Lines
content:
Some people go their whole lives
without ever writing a single poem.
Extraordinary people who don't hesitate
to cut somebody's heart or skull open.

title: The Wrong Way Home by Edward Taylor — Love Poetry Lines
content:
All night a door floated down the river.
It tried to remember little incidents of pleasure
from its former life, like the time the lovers
leaned again

title: Loyalty by Edward Taylor — Nature Poetry Lines
content:
This is the hardest part:
When I came back to life
I was a good family dog
and not too friendly to strangers.
I got a thirty-five dollar raise
in sala

title: The Lost Pilot by Edward Taylor — Nature Poetry Lines
content:
for my father, 1922-1944

title: Happy As The Day Is Long by Edward Taylor — Deep Poetry Lines
content:
I take the long walk up the staircase to my secret room.
Today's big news: they found Amelia Earhart's shoe, size 9.

title: Goodtime Jesus by Edward Taylor — Deep Poetry Lines
content:
Jesus got up one day a little later than usual. He had been dream-
ing so deep there was nothing left in his head. What was it?

title: Head of a White Woman Winking by Edward Taylor — Love Poetry Lines
content:
She has one good bumblebee
which she leads about town
on a leash of clover.
It's as big as a Saint Bernard
but also extremely fragile.
